trans-unit.note: Bundle name
A text label showing the price of a product. The argument is the string “%.2f”.
A button with an icon. The argument is an SF Symbol.
A label displaying the quantity of an item. The text inside the label is replaced by the current value of the quantity.
A label displaying the number of items in an order. The argument is the number of items in the order.
A label displaying the duration of a network check-in, in minutes. The argument is the duration of the check-in in seconds.
A label showing the percentage of the order that has been completed. The argument is a percentage value.
A label displaying the wait time for a given store. The argument is the number of minutes the user should wait at the store.
A label displaying the quantity of a product in the cart, followed by a vertical bar, and then the name of the product. The argument is the quantity of the product in the cart.
A placeholder text for the OTP code field.
A placeholder text for a phone number field.
A loading message in a receipt-style UI. The number in the parentheses indicates the step number.
A button label that requests permission to access a feature.
A title for an order that is still pending payment.
A title
A button label that allows a user to add a new delivery address.

trans-unit.id: Add a delivery address to place orders.
trans-unit.source: Add a delivery address to place orders.
trans-unit.target: Thêm địa chỉ giao hàng để đặt món.
Cần lưu ý gì thêm không?

trans-unit.note: A button label that says "Apply".
A subtitle displayed below the "Driver Nearby" status for an order that is being delivered.
A small, secondary label below the main text in the active status banner. The text indicates that the session will automatically end in a certain amount of time.
A subtitle displayed below the "Ready to Pickup" title, indicating that the order is available for pickup at a specific counter.

trans-unit.target: Barista đang pha chế cho bạn
trans-unit.note: A description for the "Crafting..." status on the order tracking card.
A title for the mode sheet.
A section header for the list of notification channels.

trans-unit.id: Check in to a coffee shop to see who else is there and start a conversation.
trans-unit.source: Check in to a coffee shop to see who else is there and start a conversation.
trans-unit.target: Check-in tại quán cà phê để xem có ai ở đó và bắt chuyện.

trans-unit.note: A label indicating that a store is closed.
A label displaying the voucher code
A button label that completes the initial setup process.
A button label that confirms a user's check-in.
A button that allows the user to confirm their selected location.
The title for an order that has been confirmed.

trans-unit.id: Connect with friends at your favorite coffee spot
trans-unit.source: Connect with friends at your favorite coffee spot
trans-unit.target: Kết nối bạn bè tại quán quen
trans-unit.note: A description of the feature that allows users to connect with friends at their favorite coffee spots.
A button label that says "Continue".
A label indicating that a delivery address is the user's default address.
The title of the view.
A status subtitle for an order that is currently being delivered.

trans-unit.target: Tài xế đã rời cửa hàng
trans-unit.note: A subtitle for an order that is ready to be picked up.
A button label that prompts the user to enable a feature.
A label displayed below a completed order status.
A header label for the user's favorites section.

trans-unit.id: Find friends at your local coffee shop
trans-unit.source: Find friends at your local coffee shop
trans-unit.target: Tìm bạn tại quán cà phê

trans-unit.id: Help us optimize recommendations for your taste.
trans-unit.source: Help us optimize recommendations for your taste.
trans-unit.target: Giúp chúng tôi tối ưu gợi ý theo gu của bạn.
trans-unit.note: A description under the "Taste Profile" section of the InitialSetupView.
A message displayed when there are no stores loaded yet.
Label for a product size option.
A label displayed above a text field for additional details about a report.
The title of a screen that lists and allows management of the user's favorite items.
A label indicating that a voucher does not have an expiration date.
Text to be shown when there are no items in the menu.
A description of the empty state when there are no saved delivery addresses.

trans-unit.id: No vouchers available at this time.
trans-unit.source: No vouchers available at this time.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when a user has no vouchers available.
A footnote below a medication name in the favorites list, displaying any notes the user has added for that medication.
The text displayed next to a green dot in the "Open" section of a store card.
A title displayed above the countdown timer in the undo order view.
A label displayed when the user's order has been received by the store.
A status title for an order that is currently being delivered.
A subtitle displayed when an order is in the "Pending" state, indicating that payment verification is needed.
The title of the permissions section in the InitialSetupView.
A label displayed above the user's notification preference settings.
A status text for an order that is ready to be picked up.
A label for the report sheet.
A heading that describes the purpose of the required permissions.

trans-unit.target: Tìm theo tên hoặc địa chỉ...
trans-unit.note: A placeholder text in the search field of the stores view.
A placeholder text in the address search field.
A placeholder text for a search field in the menu view.
A placeholder text for a text field used to search for stores.
A button label that submits a report.
A text label displaying the time of a post.
A label at the top of a post card indicating its type and the time it was posted. The argument is the type of the post, and the second argument is the time it was posted.
The title of a section in the initial setup view related to taste preferences.
A placeholder text for a text field in the report sheet where users can provide more details about their report.
A status label for an order that has been cancelled.

trans-unit.target: Cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn chúng tôi
trans-unit.note: A thank-you message displayed when an order is successfully completed.
Brand name, keep or use app_name.

trans-unit.id: This order will not be fulfilled
trans-unit.source: This order will not be fulfilled
trans-unit.target: Đơn hàng này sẽ không được thực hiện
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when an order is cancelled.

trans-unit.id: To facilitate localized detection and order updates, the following permissions are required.
trans-unit.source: To facilitate localized detection and order updates, the following permissions are required.
trans-unit.target: Để định vị và cập nhật đơn hàng, cần các quyền sau.
trans-unit.note: A description of the permissions required for the app to function correctly.
A button label that instructs the user to try the action again.
Text displayed below the message indicating that the user can try searching for something else.
A button that allows a user to undo an order.
A
A label indicating that a voucher has already been applied.
A label displaying the expiration date of a voucher.
A section header for the visibility settings in the check-in sheet.
A subtitle displayed below "Order Received" when an order is in the "Received" state.
A question displayed in the "Report" sheet, asking the user to specify the reason for the report.

trans-unit.id: You can undo this order within 30s
trans-unit.source: You can undo this order within 30s
trans-unit.target: Bạn có thể hoàn tác trong 30s

trans-unit.id: You haven't used any vouchers yet.
trans-unit.source: You haven't used any vouchers yet.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when a user has not used any vouchers yet.
A label describing the user's current taste preference.
A label displayed above the user's current network intent.

trans-unit.id: Your order is in the queue
trans-unit.source: Your order is in the queue
trans-unit.target: Đơn hàng đang chờ xử lý
trans-unit.note: A subtitle displayed below the "Confirmed" status, indicating that the user's order is in the queue.
A character used to start a progress bar.
A button that allows interaction with a post on the Editorial Community Board.
A closing square bracket in the progress bar.
A section header that lists active orders. The number in parentheses is replaced with the actual number of orders.
The title of the "AI Quick Order" modal.
A label describing the AI-driven recommendation feature.
A button label that says "Apply".
A button label that says "Browse Menu".
A button label that says "Continue".
A button label that says "Not now".
A button label that says "OK".
A button label that says "Order".
A button that resends the OTP code.
A button that, when pressed, resets the OTP code entry and the authentication state to "idle".
A button label that says "Cancel".

trans-unit.target: Thêm món vào giỏ để đặt hàng ngay nhé.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when a user's cart is empty, encouraging them to browse the menu.

trans-unit.target: Giỏ hàng đang trống. Hãy thêm món nhé.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when a user's cart is empty, encouraging them to return to the menu.
The title of the empty cart view.
Label for the delivery fee in the cart summary.
Label for a discount item in the cart summary.
Label for the subtotal in the cart summary.
A label displaying the number of items in the cart. The argument is the count of items in the cart.
Prefix to be used in the UI for "high" confidence levels.
Prefix to be used in the UI for a confidence level of .low.
Prefix to be used in the UI for a confidence level of .medium.

trans-unit.target: Đang tập trung, chưa tiện trò chuyện
trans-unit.note: Description of a connection mode when the mode is "focus".

trans-unit.target: Hiển thị với những người yêu cà phê khác
trans-unit.note: Description of a connection mode when the mode is "open".
Description of a connection mode when the user is focused.
Display name for the "Open" connection mode.
The text that appears in the order summary for a single customization option. The text is built from the names of the selected size, sugar level, and ice level, and any selected toppings.
Label for the base delivery fee in the delivery fee breakdown.
Label for the delivery fee that depends on the distance.
Label for the surge fee in the delivery fee breakdown.

trans-unit.source: How would you like your order?
trans-unit.target: Bạn muốn nhận đơn hàng thế nào?

trans-unit.note: Message to display when a delivery is unavailable due to a lack of drivers.

trans-unit.target: Địa chỉ này nằm ngoài vùng giao hàng
trans-unit.note: Message to display when a delivery is unavailable because the customer is in an area outside the store's delivery zone.

trans-unit.target: Cửa hàng hiện đang đóng cửa
trans-unit.note: Message displayed when a store is closed for delivery.
Message for when a store is temporarily unavailable for delivery.
Message to display when a delivery is unavailable due to the customer being too far from the store.
A button label that appears in debug mode, allowing the user to bypass the OTP verification process for testing purposes.
A button label that says "Edit".
The title of an alert that appears when an error occurs.
A string that displays the estimated arrival time. The format specifier is replaced with the actual time.

The text to be displayed in the delivery ETA view, showing the estimated delivery time range. The first argument is the minimum estimated delivery time. The second argument is the maximum estimated delivery time.
The title of the "Events" section in the home view.
A label showing how many times a given item has been added to the user's favorites. The number is dynamically replaced based on the `orderCount` of the `Favorite`.

trans-unit.source: You haven't added any favorites yet.
trans-unit.target: Lưu món yêu thích để đặt lại nhanh hơn
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when a user has not added any favorites.
A title displayed when a user has not added any favorites.
A title displayed in the navigation header.
A greeting message at the top of the home screen, including the user's name.

trans-unit.target: Đăng nhập để tích điểm & nhận quà
trans-unit.note: A subtitle for a guest user's profile.
A greeting message at the top of the home screen, including the user's name.
Description of an ice level when the user selects "Extra" ice.
Description of an ice level option that is less than the usual amount.
Description of an ice level option when the user does not want any ice.
Description of an ice level when the user selects "Normal" ice level.
Text that describes the user's current activity, in this case, checking in at a location. The argument is the name of the location.
The intent to order coffee in the morning.
A string that represents the user's current intent, in this case, the status of an active order. The argument is the status of the order.
The title of the button that saves changes to an item in the cart.
A message below the title, providing instructions to the user. The message changes based on whether the user has already received an OTP or not.

trans-unit.source: Please enter your phone number to continue.
trans-unit.target: Chúng tôi sẽ gửi mã xác thực cho bạn.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed below the phone number input field, instructing the user to enter their phone number.

trans-unit.target: Thông tin của bạn luôn được bảo mật.
trans-unit.note: A note displayed below the phone input section, explaining that the user's information is handled securely.
The title for the login screen when an OTP has been sent.
A title for the section where the user inputs their phone number.

trans-unit.target: Đang tìm vị trí gần nhất...
Mục đích của bạn là gì?

trans-unit.source: Be the first to check in!
trans-unit.target: Hãy là người đầu tiên check in!

trans-unit.note: A small, italicized note displayed below each cart item, showing any custom notes that have been added.
A placeholder text for the notes field in the edit cart item sheet.
A label displayed above a text field for adding notes to a cart item.
The title of the "Offers" section.
A placeholder text that appears
A label displaying the order number. The argument is a placeholder for the order number.
A label displaying the date and time when an order was placed. The value inside the placeholder is replaced with the actual date and time of the order.
Display name for the "Cancelled" order status.
Display name for the "Completed" order status.
Display name for the "delivering" order status.
Display name for the "pending" order status.
Display name for the "placed" order status.
Display name for the "preparing" order status.
Display name for the "ready" order status.
Display name for the "Received" order status.

trans-unit.source: Your order has been successfully placed. We'll notify you when it's ready.
trans-unit.target: Đơn hàng của bạn đã được đặt thành công. Chúng tôi sẽ thông báo khi sẵn sàng.

trans-unit.note: Display name for the "delivery" ordering mode.
Display name for the "dine in" ordering mode.
Display name for the "Pickup" ordering mode.

trans-unit.source: When you place an order, it will appear here.
trans-unit.target: Khi bạn đặt hàng, đơn hàng sẽ hiện ở đây.

trans-unit.note: Title for the tab that lists currently active orders.
Title for the "History" tab in the Orders screen.
Name of the payment method "Apple Pay".
Name of the icon to display for a payment method.
Name of the payment method "cash".
Name of the payment method icon for MO Mo payments.
Name of the payment method icon for Zalopay.
The title of the "Popular" section in the Checkout view.
Title for a prediction reason that corresponds to an "afternoon" time slot.
A string that describes the reason for a prediction.
Text for a prediction reason that corresponds to an "evening" time slot.
Name of the prediction reason when the item is ordered frequently.
Text for a prediction reason that comes from the user's prediction history.
Text for a prediction reason that corresponds to a specific time slot (e.g. "morning").
Text for a prediction reason that corresponds to a specific time slot (e.g. "night").
A reason for a predicted cart that is based on historical order data and does not depend on external factors like time of day or weather.
Name of a prediction reason when a product is trending.
Reason for a predicted cart based on the weather.

trans-unit.source: Friends can see where you are.
trans-unit.target: Chỉ bạn bè thấy bạn đang ở quán
trans-unit.note: Description string for the "Friends" presence mode.

trans-unit.source: Only you can see your location.
trans-unit.target: Ẩn trạng thái với mọi người
trans-unit.note: Description string for a "private" presence mode.

trans-unit.target: Ai ở quán cũng thấy bạn
trans-unit.note: Description string for a "Public" presence mode.
Display name for the "Friends" presence mode.
Display name for the "private" presence mode.
Display name for the "Public" presence mode.

trans-unit.source: Join our membership program to earn points, redeem vouchers, and get exclusive offers.
trans-unit.target: Tham gia thành viên để tích điểm, đổi voucher và nhận ưu đãi độc quyền.
Đăng nhập để xem ưu đãi

trans-unit.note: A placeholder text for a promotion code field.

trans-unit.source: Align the QR code within the frame to check in
trans-unit.target: Căn mã QR vào khung để check in

trans-unit.note: A reason for reporting a user as harassing.
A reason for reporting a user as an imposter.
A reason for reporting a user as inappropriate.
Display name for the "Other" report reason.
Reason for reporting a user as spam.
A button label that returns the user to the main menu.
A button label that says "Save".

trans-unit.target: Thử tìm kiếm từ khóa khác

trans-unit.note: Placeholder text for the delivery address selection field in the checkout view.
Placeholder text for the store selection button in the checkout view.
A placeholder text to display when a user is not signed in.
Display name for the "Large" product size.
Name of a product size when the size is medium.
Display name for a product size option.

trans-unit.target: Thói quen hàng ngày, hoàn hảo

trans-unit.note: Name of the display name for the "available" presence status.
Display name for the "away" presence status.
Status message indicating that the order has been successfully confirmed.
Status message indicating that the app is connecting to the server.
Status message indicating that the app is attempting to create an order.
Display name for the "focused" presence status.
Status message indicating that the app is attempting to open the payment gateway.
A success message that is displayed when a user successfully places an order. The argument is the first 8 characters of the order ID.
A placeholder text indicating that the app is currently verifying the OTP code.

trans-unit.source: Try adjusting your search or check back later.
trans-unit.target: Thử điều chỉnh tìm kiếm hoặc quay lại sau.

trans-unit.note: Text that appears after a sugar level option to indicate the percentage of sugar.
Text that appears after a sugar level option to indicate the percentage.
Text that appears after a sugar level option to indicate the percentage of sugar.
Text that appears after a sugar level option to indicate the percentage of sugar.
The text that appears after a sugar level option to indicate the percentage. For example, "sugar_level_suffix 100%".
Display name for the "Bronze" membership tier.
Display name for the "Gold" membership tier.
Display name for the "Platinum" membership tier.
Display name for the "Silver" membership tier.
Display name for the "arrived" delivery tracking status.
Display name for the "assigned" delivery tracking status.
The name to display for the "delivered" delivery tracking status.
The display name for the "en_route" delivery tracking status.
Display name for the "near by" delivery tracking status.
Display name for the "Picked Up" delivery tracking status.
The string that describes a voucher discount, including the discount value. The argument is the discount value, formatted in Vietnamese Dong.
The text that appears next to a voucher code in the app, showing the type and amount of discount it provides.
Text describing a voucher that provides free delivery.
The title of the voucher section in the checkout screen.
A period used to separate different pieces of information in a list or description.
A placeholder text for the country code in the phone input field.
